registry_status: DRAFT — requires compliance/legal SME validation; not a conformity assessment

evidence_kinds.verification-record: a verification basis (e.g. recall/precision on a frozen holdout)
evidence_kinds.provenance-lineage: source/channel/verification lineage tracing the evidence to its origin
evidence_kinds.threat-coverage: the requirement's risk is mapped to a recorded threat

requirements.annex_iv_item: 2(b) design specifications & general logic of the system
requirements.obligation: Document the detection/prevention logic and how it was derived.

requirements.annex_iv_item: 2(g) validation and testing procedures and results
requirements.obligation: Show validation procedures and measured results for each control.

requirements.annex_iv_item: 3 monitoring, functioning and control of the system
requirements.obligation: Demonstrate ongoing monitoring and control-drift detection.
Identify and prioritise risks (threats) and their mitigations.

requirements.annex_iv_item: 5 changes to the system through its lifecycle
requirements.obligation: Track changes with reproducible, traceable evidence over time.
Enforce source provenance for all evidence and inputs.
